review_basis: Independent labeled row QA plus three-worker blind consensus

directions.observed: Centered face with raised pupils, lifted muzzle, and upright ears
directions.reason: Unmistakable up cardinal in labeled and blind review.

directions.observed: Pupils and nose shift screen-right while the eye line and muzzle remain raised
directions.reason: Both horizontal and vertical axes passed blind and labeled review.

directions.observed: Clear rightward yaw with elevated pupils, muzzle, and ears
directions.reason: Progressive up-right pose passed blind and labeled review.

directions.observed: Strong screen-right nose and pupil displacement with a remaining upward head angle
directions.reason: Labeled loop and blind majority confirm the intended quadrant.

directions.observed: Nose, muzzle, pupils, and facial plane project toward screen-right
directions.reason: Unmistakable screen-right cardinal in labeled and blind review.

directions.observed: Rightward yaw remains clear while pupils, eyelids, and muzzle begin lowering
directions.reason: Both axes passed; the measured center shift is head and ear articulation without a lower-body pop.

directions.observed: Nose and visible face remain screen-right while lowered pupils, lids, and muzzle read down
directions.reason: Blind horizontal classification was ambiguous, but labeled normal-size review confirms down-right and the loop does not reverse.

directions.observed: Mostly centered-down head with a small remaining screen-right bias and softened ears
directions.reason: Blind horizontal classification was ambiguous by design near vertical; labeled review confirms one ordinary step before 180.

directions.observed: Symmetric frontal face with lowered pupils, eyelids, muzzle, and softened ears
directions.reason: Unmistakable down cardinal in labeled and blind review.

directions.observed: Nose and both pupils sit screen-left while the eye line and muzzle remain lowered
directions.reason: Both axes passed blind and labeled review.

directions.observed: Stronger leftward nose and pupil shift with bowed brow and lowered muzzle
directions.reason: Both axes passed blind and labeled review.

directions.observed: Nose and pupils remain clearly screen-left with a subtle downward gaze and muzzle angle
directions.reason: Blind vertical classification was ambiguous, but labeled normal-size review confirms down-left with no quadrant reversal.

directions.observed: Broad near-frontal head with nose and both pupils clearly left of center
directions.reason: Redesigned scale-safe cardinal is unmistakably screen-left in labeled and blind review.

directions.observed: Nose and pupils stay screen-left while raised muzzle and elevated gaze add up
directions.reason: Both axes passed blind and labeled review.

directions.observed: Left-biased nose and pupils with lifted eye line, muzzle, and upright ears
directions.reason: Both axes passed and scale remains continuous.

directions.observed: Raised pupils and muzzle with a subtle remaining screen-left nose and pupil offset
directions.reason: Blind horizontal classification was ambiguous near vertical; labeled review and the stable 337.5-to-000 boundary confirm up-left.
